---
name: testing
description: 'Write tests for Lixpi services. Use when creating unit tests, integration tests, test utilities, or running tests for any language or framework in this project.'
---

# Testing

Test conventions and patterns for each language/framework are documented in `documentation/testing/`.

## How to Find the Right Guide

Browse `documentation/testing/` — it is organized by language and then by service:

```
documentation/testing/
  TypeScript/
    web-ui/
      TESTING-GUIDE.md
  (future languages and services go here)
```

When writing tests:

1. Navigate to `documentation/testing/` and find the guide matching the language and service you're working on.
2. Read the full guide before writing any test code.
3. Follow every convention in that guide — file naming, test structure, runner commands, mocking patterns.
